name: clipacanvas
description: Render HTML, CSS, SVG, and canvas animations to MP4 through the Clip.A.Canvas MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Render browser animation code to MP4.
interface.longDescription: Clip.A.Canvas adds a local MCP renderer that turns HTML, CSS, SVG, JavaScript, and canvas animations into MP4 files using Chromium and FFmpeg.
defaultPrompt: Render this HTML animation to MP4.
Export this SVG motion as a video.
Save this canvas animation to an MP4 file.
